purpose: draft type model + scoped getEffective resolution algorithm + edge-case checklist
decision: reviewed draft; adopted scope precedence (project>device>global>default) and the type model. REJECTED draft's require()-based load (wrong for ESNext/bundler -> use fs.readFileSync), REJECTED writeJsonAtomic(...).catch() (helper is synchronous, returns void), REJECTED the empty-global ensureLoaded heuristic (use explicit loaded flag), and hardened setSetting to validate scope/target instead of silent no-op. Final module hand-written.
